original:
You’re facing off against an amber-haired ant-girl armed with a hatchet and a handgun. Given her desecrated Scarlet Federation uniform - her country, name, and rank patches are all torn off - she’s definitely a deserter.

Her shirt is torn wide open in a very un-red like manner. Her pert, small breasts are on display, though there’s a bullet scar just to the side of her heart. There’s another scar over her right eye, which she seems unable to fully close.

Hanging from both her gently curving hips are hand grenades. They’re attached to her belt, ready to unclick and throw at a moment’s notice.
